en: So all Israel was recorded in genealogies, and these are written in the Book of the Kings of Israel. And Judah was taken into exile in Babylon because of their breach of faith.
zh: 全體以色列人都照著家譜登記，都寫在“以色列諸王記”上；猶大人因為悖逆，就被擄到巴比倫去。

en: Now the first to dwell again in their possessions in their cities were Israel, the priests, the Levites, and the temple servants.
zh: 那些最先回來，住在自己的地業、自己的城中的，有以色列人、祭司、利未人和作殿役的。

en: And some of the people of Judah, Benjamin, Ephraim, and Manasseh lived in Jerusalem:
zh: 在耶路撒冷居住的，有猶大支派、便雅憫支派、以法蓮支派和瑪拿西支派的人。

en: Uthai the son of Ammihud, son of Omri, son of Imri, son of Bani, from the sons of Perez the son of Judah.
zh: 猶大的兒子法勒斯的子孫中，有烏太；烏太是亞米忽的兒子，亞米忽是暗利的兒子；暗利是音利的兒子，音利是巴尼的兒子。

en: And of the Shilonites: Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.
zh: 示羅的子孫中，有長子亞帥雅和他的眾子。

en: Of the sons of Zerah: Jeuel and their kinsmen, 690.
zh: 謝拉的子孫中，有耶烏利和他們的親族，共六百九十人。

en: Of the Benjaminites: Sallu the son of Meshullam, son of Hodaviah, son of Hassenuah,
zh: 便雅憫的子孫中，有哈西努的曾孫、何達威雅的孫子、米書蘭的兒子撒路；

en: Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, Elah the son of Uzzi, son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephatiah, son of Reuel, son of Ibnijah;
zh: 又有耶羅罕的兒子伊比尼雅，米基立的孫子、烏西的兒子以拉，以及伊比尼雅的曾孫、流珥的孫子、示法提雅的兒子米書蘭，

en: and their kinsmen according to their generations, 956. All these were heads of fathers' houses according to their fathers' houses.
zh: 還有他們的眾親族；按著他們的家譜登記，共有九百五十六人。以上這些人都是他們各家族的首領。

en: Of the priests: Jedaiah, Jehoiarib, Jachin,
zh: 祭司中有耶大雅、耶何雅立、雅斤，

en: and Azariah the son of Hilkiah, son of Meshullam, son of Zadok, son of Meraioth, son of Ahitub, the chief officer of the house of God;
zh: 還有管理 神的殿的希勒家的兒子亞薩利雅；希勒家是米書蘭的兒子，米書蘭是撒督的兒子，撒督是米拉約的兒子，米拉約是亞希突的兒子。

en: and Adaiah the son of Jeroham, son of Pashhur, son of Malchijah, and Maasai the son of Adiel, son of Jahzerah, son of Meshullam, son of Meshillemith, son of Immer;
zh: 又有瑪基雅的曾孫、巴施戶珥的孫子、耶羅罕的兒子亞大雅，以及亞第業的兒子瑪賽；亞第業是雅希細拉的兒子，雅希細拉是米書蘭的兒子，米書蘭是米實利密的兒子，米實利密是音麥的兒子；

en: besides their kinsmen, heads of their fathers' houses, 1,760, mighty men for the work of the service of the house of God.
zh: 以及他們的眾親族，他們家族的首領，共有一千七百六十人，都是有才幹，很會作神殿裡工作的人。

en: Of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, son of Azrikam, son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;
zh: 利未支派米拉利的子孫中，有哈沙比雅的曾孫、押利甘的孫子、哈述的兒子示瑪雅；

en: and Bakbakkar, Heresh, Galal and Mattaniah the son of Mica, son of Zichri, son of Asaph;
zh: 又有拔巴甲、黑勒施、迦拉，和亞薩的曾孫、細基利的孫子、米迦的兒子瑪探雅；

en: and Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, son of Galal, son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, son of Elkanah, who lived in the villages of the Netophathites.
zh: 又有耶杜頓的曾孫、迦拉的孫子、示瑪雅的兒子俄巴底；還有以利加拿的孫子、亞撒的兒子比利家；他們都住在尼陀法人的村落。

en: The gatekeepers were Shallum, Akkub, Talmon, Ahiman, and their kinsmen (Shallum was the chief);
zh: 守門的有沙龍、亞谷、達們、亞希幔和他們的眾親族；沙龍是他們的首領。

en: until then they were in the king's gate on the east side as the gatekeepers of the camps of the Levites.
zh: 直到現在，他們仍是看守東面的王門；他們曾經作過利未營的守門人。

en: Shallum the son of Kore, son of Ebiasaph, son of Korah, and his kinsmen of his fathers' house, the Korahites, were in charge of the work of the service, keepers of the thresholds of the tent, as their fathers had been in charge of the camp of the LORD, keepers of the entrance.
zh: 可拉的曾孫、以比雅撒的孫子、可利的兒子沙龍，以及他的眾親族可拉人，擔任事務的工作，看守會幕的門；他們的祖先曾經管理耶和華的營幕，看守營門。

en: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar was the chief officer over them in time past; the LORD was with him.
zh: 從前以利亞撒的兒子非尼哈，曾經作過他們的領袖，耶和華也與他同在。

en: Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah was gatekeeper at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
zh: 米施利米雅的兒子撒迦利雅，是看守會幕大門的。

en: All these, who were chosen as gatekeepers at the thresholds, were 212. They were enrolled by genealogies in their villages. David and Samuel the seer established them in their office of trust.
zh: 這些被選看守殿門的人，共有二百一十二人；他們在自己的村莊裡按著家譜登記；他們是大衛和撒母耳先見指派承擔這職任的。

en: So they and their sons were in charge of the gates of the house of the LORD, that is, the house of the tent, as guards.
zh: 他們和他們的子孫，按著班次，看守耶和華的殿門，就是會幕的門。

en: The gatekeepers were on the four sides, east, west, north, and south.
zh: 在東西南北四方，都有看守的人。

en: And their kinsmen who were in their villages were obligated to come in every seven days, in turn, to be with these,
zh: 他們的親族，就是住在他們村莊裡的，每七天就要來和他們換班。

en: for the four chief gatekeepers, who were Levites, were entrusted to be over the chambers and the treasures of the house of God.
zh: 四個殿門的守衛長都是利未人，受託看守 神的殿的房間和庫房。

en: And they lodged around the house of God, for on them lay the duty of watching, and they had charge of opening it every morning.
zh: 他們在 神的殿的四周住宿，因為他們承擔看守的責任，並且每天早晨要負責開門。

en: Some of them had charge of the utensils of service, for they were required to count them when they were brought in and taken out.
zh: 利未人中有管理器皿的使用的；他們按著數目拿出去，也要按著數目拿進來。

en: Others of them were appointed over the furniture and over all the holy utensils, also over the fine flour, the wine, the oil, the incense, and the spices.
zh: 他們當中又有人受託管理器具，和管理聖所的一切器具，以及細麵、酒、油、乳香、香料。

en: Others, of the sons of the priests, prepared the mixing of the spices,
zh: 祭司的子孫中，有人用香料配製成香膏。

en: and Mattithiah, one of the Levites, the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, was entrusted with making the flat cakes.
zh: 利未人瑪他提雅是可拉族沙龍的長子，他的職責是管理在煎盤烤餅的事。

en: Also some of their kinsmen of the Kohathites had charge of the showbread, to prepare it every Sabbath.
zh: 他們的親族哥轄的子孫中，有管理陳設餅的，每安息日要預備擺設。

en: Now these, the singers, the heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, were in the chambers of the temple free from other service, for they were on duty day and night.
zh: 這些是歌唱的人，是利未各家族的首領，住在殿院的房間裡，不作別的事，日夜只顧自己的事工。

en: These were heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, according to their generations, leaders. These lived in Jerusalem.
zh: 以上這些人都是利未各家族的首領，按他們的家譜都是首領；這些人都住在耶路撒冷。

en: In Gibeon lived the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, and the name of his wife was Maacah,
zh: 住在基遍的有基遍的父親耶利，他的妻子名叫瑪迦。

en: and his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab,
zh: 他的長子是亞伯頓，其餘的是蘇珥、基士、巴力、尼珥、拿答、

en: Gedor, Ahio, Zechariah, and Mikloth;
zh: 基多、亞希約、撒迦利雅、米基羅。

en: and Mikloth was the father of Shimeam; and these also lived opposite their kinsmen in Jerusalem, with their kinsmen.
zh: 米基羅生示米暗。他們也和他們的親族一同住在耶路撒冷，和他們的親族為鄰。

en: Ner fathered Kish, Kish fathered Saul, Saul fathered Jonathan, Malchi-shua, Abinadab, and Eshbaal.
zh: 尼珥生基士，基士生掃羅，掃羅生約拿單、麥基舒亞、亞比拿達和伊施．巴力。

en: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal, and Merib-baal fathered Micah.
zh: 約拿單的兒子是米力．巴力；米力．巴力生米迦。

en: The sons of Micah: Pithon, Melech, Tahrea, and Ahaz.
zh: 米迦的兒子是毘敦、米勒、他利亞和亞哈斯。

en: And Ahaz fathered Jarah, and Jarah fathered Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri. And Zimri fathered Moza.
zh: 亞哈斯生雅拉；雅拉生亞拉篾、亞斯瑪威和心利。心利生摩撒；

en: Moza fathered Binea, and Rephaiah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
zh: 摩撒生比尼亞；比尼亞的兒子是利法雅，利法雅的兒子是以利亞薩，以利亞薩的兒子是亞悉。

en: Azel had six sons and these are their names: Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan; these were the sons of Azel.
zh: 亞悉有六個兒子，他們的名字是亞斯利干、波基路、以實瑪利、示亞利雅、俄巴底雅、哈難；這都是亞悉的兒子。
